_comment: Pre-biopsy diagnostic profile: 62M with new-onset right-hand weakness + word-finding difficulty × 3 weeks; brain MRI shows 4.2 cm ring-enhancing left frontal mass with central necrosis + vasogenic edema. Engine should match WORKUP-SUSPECTED-GBM and emit Diagnostic Brief — neurosurgical biopsy/resection required for histology + IDH-1/2 + MGMT methylation + 1p/19q before treatment.

suspicion.presentation: 62M presents to neurology with progressive right-hand weakness + intermittent expressive aphasia (word-finding difficulty) × 3 weeks. No headache initially; recent onset mild morning headache + 2 episodes of focal motor seizure (right-hand twitching, no LOC). Brain_MRI_with_contrast: 4.2 cm left frontal mass with ring-enhancement, central necrosis, surrounding T2 vasogenic_edema, midline shift 4 mm. Left precentral cortex involvement. No leptomeningeal enhancement. Started dexamethasone 4 mg q6h + levetiracetam 500 mg BID. Imaging strongly suspicious for glioblastoma vs metastatic disease — biopsy required.
